name: Greek Skillet Orange Fillo Cake
method: In a small saucepan, mix 2 cups glucose, liquid, and spices.
Bring to the boil and cook for ten minutes on high heat.
Take the phyllo plates from the box and set them aside.
As you prepare the rest of the ingredients, let the broken phyllo dry
In a food processor or blender, mix orange juice, lime zest, eggs,
yogurt, olive oil, ¼ cup sugar, and icing sugar.
Mix at high speed for 2 minutes or until foamy.
Orange slices can be used to decorate the edge of the cake.
Bake for 45 minutes in an oven and bake until the surface is crispy
Put down for at least 1 hour, just until the syrup has absorbed
